zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Kincaid於1750年12月13日出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州時，他的父親John Kinkead29歲，母親Elizabeth Jordan30歲。他於1778年與Hannah Clingan在美國賓夕法尼亞州波藍德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1834年在美國田納西州安德森享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Kincaid于1750年12月13日出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州时，他的父亲John Kinkead29岁，母亲Elizabeth Jordan30岁。他于1778年与Hannah Clingan在美国宾夕法尼亚州波藍德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1834年在美国田纳西州安德森享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kincaid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Kincaid in Campsie (Stirlingshire), recorded in 1238 as Kincaith.

variants.name: Kincaide
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Kincaid  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Kinkaid
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Kincaid  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.

historicEvents.title: Harrisburg Becomes the State Capital
historicEvents.description: Harrisburg had important parts with migration, the Civil War, and the Industrial Revolution.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History-History of Harrisburg Pennsylvania

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: Making States Equal
historicEvents.description: The Missouri Compromise helped provide the entrance of Maine as a free state and Missouri as a slave state into the United States. As part of the compromise, slavery was prohibited north of the 36°30′ parallel, excluding Missouri.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Kincaid was born on 13 December 1750, in Pennsylvania, United States, his father, John Kinkead, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Jordan, was 30. He married Hannah Clingan in 1778, in Cumberland, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1834, in Anderson, Tennessee, United States, at the age of 84.

et.Jefferson, Rutherford, Tennessee: Old Jefferson, Rutherford, Tennessee, Ameerika Ühendriigid

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Kincaid est né le 13 décembre 1750, à Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, son père, John Kinkead, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Jordan, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Clingan en 1778, à Cumberland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1834, à Anderson, Tennessee, États-Unis, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.Jefferson, Rutherford, Tennessee: Old Jefferson, Rutherford, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Kincaid am 13. Dezember 1750 in Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Kinkead 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Jordan 30. Er hat 1778 in Cumberland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Hannah Clingan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1834 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Anderson, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Kincaid è nato il il 13 dicembre 1750 nel Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, John Kinkead, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Jordan, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Clingan nel 1778, nel Cumberland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1834, nel Anderson, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Kincaidが1750年12月13日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州で生まれた時，父John Kinkeadは29歳，母Elizabeth Jordanは30歳であった。1778年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州クウンバーランドでHannah Clinganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1834年にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州アンダーソンで84歳で死去した。

ko.Jefferson, Rutherford, Tennessee: 미국 테네시 주 루더퍼드 드 제퍼슨
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Kincaid(이)가 1750년 12월 13일 미국 펜실베이니아 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Kinkead(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Jordan(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1778년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 c벌랜드에서 Hannah Clingan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1834년 미국 테네시 주 앤더슨에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Kincaid nasceu em 13 de dezembro de 1750, em Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Kinkead, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Jordan, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Clingan em 1778, em Cumberland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1834, em Anderson, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América, com 84 anos.

ru.Jefferson, Rutherford, Tennessee: олд джеффирсон, рутирфорд, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Kincaid родился 13 декабря 1750 г. в местности Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени John Kinkead было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Jordan, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Clingan в 1778 г. в местности кумбирланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1834 г. в местности андирсон, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 84 лет.
